The '''Asilyr''' tribe was a nomadic clan of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] known for being friendlier than the planet's other tribes. Though initially suspicious of newcomers, the Asilyr would eventually welcome strangers into their tribes and made effective guides through the Western [[Doaba Badlands]]. Socorro's sun, [[Sokor/Legends|Sokor]], was considered an enemy by the Asilyr, who carried on the activities of daily life at night.
